creator: jason@netcetera.ch
text:
There is already an mxv package for version 1.10. This is mostly
	derived from that. Other than upgrading to a newer version (v1.20),
	the main change I made was to remove an unneeded call to a sound 
	initialization routine that caused problems for the sounds cards
	that I have using Luigi's pcm driver.

Fix: N/A
